overview: A complete student-friendly informational website for VIT-AP university. Covers all 12 key sections including academics, hostel life, survival guides, and interactive tools like attendance/CGPA calculators — everything a VIT-AP student needs in one place.
features: 12 information sections covering every aspect of student life
Interactive attendance calculator with target percentage tracking
CGPA calculator with semester and cumulative averages
Bunk planner to maximize skippable classes safely
Collapsible sidebar navigation with mobile hamburger menu
Detailed academics guide covering FFCS, LTPC, grading, backlogs
Hostel, food, and daily life guides
Placement data and admission cutoffs overview
Resources section with notes, PYQs, and useful links
Hidden rules and general tips section
Mobile responsive with clean, modern design
